title: Test Automation Engineer
description: Monday.com is the Work OS powering over 200K teams globally. We're building the operating system for work itself—where work management, productivity, and automation converge. We're looking for talent that thrives on solving complex problems at scale.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain automated test frameworks
Design test strategies for new product features
Execute test automation and analyze results
Collaborate with developers on test coverage

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of QA, test automation, or software testing experience

benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision coverage
Unlimited PTO and remote work flexibility
Equity options and/or stock purchase plan
